steps.title: Recall the area formula for a square
steps.content: A square with side length s has area = s × s = s².

steps.title: Substitute the given side length
steps.content: The side length is 94 cm, so: Area = 94 × 94 cm²

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: 2 · 94 = 188 — this is a fraction of the perimeter (2 sides), not area. Eliminated.
  • Choice B: 2 · 94 · 94 — doubles the area; no geometric basis for the factor of 2. Eliminated.
  • Choice C: 4 · 94 = 376 — this is the perimeter (4 sides), not area. Eliminated.
  • Choice D: 94 · 94 — side times side, which is the correct area formula. That matches choice D — D is correct.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
